dummyKey.title: Newell Sistema To Go Salad Container, Clear, 37 oz. (21356ZS)

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: The Sistema Salad To Go set features a divided insert tray and a dressing container in the center with a lid, so you can keep ingredients separate until you're ready to eat. The generously sized base is perfect for mixing up your salads, while the convenient knife and fork clip into the lid, so you don't have to carry separate cutlery. It's top-rack dishwasher safe, microwave safe without the lid, and freezer safe.
bullets: Divided insert tray plus a lidded dressing container to keep ingredients separate
Features the distinctive Sistema easy-locking clips and flexible seal; great for meal prep
Top-rack dishwasher safe, microwave safe without the lid, and freezer safe; phthalate- and BPA-free
Fun, colorful containers are designed and made in New Zealand
Colors received may vary

dummyKey.title: Staples TECH USB-C to USB-C Charging Cable, 9.8 ft., White (ST62336)

paragraph: Power your smartphones and tablets with this extra-long durable Staples® USB-C to USB-C Braided Cable. The unique braided design provides extra durability, prevents tangles and has been tested to withstand up to five-thousand bends. A 9.8ft (3m) cable length gives plenty of extra reach when needed and is perfect for comfortably using devices while they charge.
bullets: 9.8ft (3m) USB-C to USB-C charging cable that transfers data at speeds of up to 480Mbps
Braided cable for durability and tangle-prevention tested to withstand up to 5K bends
Compatible with Apple, Samsung, Google and LG products
White Generation 2.0 cable
Supports fast charging up to 60W
1-year limited warranty
headliner: Charge and sync smartphones or tablets with this durable 9.8 ft (3m) Staples® USB-C to USB-C Braided Cable.
expandedDescr: More information for Staples return policy here

Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) with MagSafe Charging Case USB‑C, White (MTJV3LL/A)~#|#~F3AFBCEE-DCD1-43E7-878BB74CBDE8BA8C_sc7
Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) with MagSafe Charging Case USB‑C, White (MTJV3LL/A)~#|#~61128A8F-E205-47FD-AC6A59349FE55A5C_sc7
Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) with MagSafe Charging Case USB‑C, White (MTJV3LL/A)~#|#~48008205-AE14-43FF-BE7B9E8E68B1DF0F_sc7
dummyKey.title: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) with MagSafe Charging Case USB‑C, White (MTJV3LL/A)

paragraph: AirPods Pro (2nd generation) with MagSafe Charging Case (USB-C) deliver up to 2x more Active Noise Cancellation than the previous generation, with Transparency mode that enables you to hear the world around you. Adaptive Audio that dynamically tailors noise control to your environment. Conversation Awareness helps lower media volume and enhance the voices in front of you while you’re interacting with others. A single charge delivers up to 6 hours of battery life. And Touch control lets you easily adjust volume with a swipe. The MagSafe Charging Case is a marvel on its own with Precision Finding, built-in speaker, and lanyard loop. The upgraded H2 chip powers smarter noise cancellation and three-dimensional sound. Adaptive EQ tunes music to your ears in real time to deliver crisp, clean high notes and deep, rich bass in stunning clarity. AirPods Pro when paired with Apple Vision Pro deliver Lossless Audio with ultra-low latency, for an unprecedented sound experience. Communicating at industry-shattering speed and unlocking a revolutionary new format rendering pure, uncompressed sound in real time. Active Noise Cancellation removes twice as much unwanted noise, so nothing interrupts your listening during a commute and when you need to focus. Transparency mode reduces and adjusts down the intensity of loud noises at 48,000 times per second, so you can comfortably hear the world around you. And Adaptive Audio¹⁶ dynamically blends Transparency mode with Active Noise Cancellation to deliver the best listening experience for you in any environment.
bullets: 1 Pair of Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) with MagSafe Charging Case (USB‑C)
Up to 6 hours of listening time and Up to 30 hours of total listening time with the MagSafe Charging Case and Active Noise Cancellation on
Active Noise Cancellation reduces unwanted background noise
Adaptive Transparency lets outside sounds in while reducing loud environmental noise
Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you
Multiple ear tips (XS, S, M, L)
Touch control lets you swipe to adjust volume, press to direct media playback, answer or end calls, and press and hold to switch between listening modes
Sweat and water resistant for AirPods Pro and charging case
Quick access to Siri by saying “Hey Siri”
Easy setup, in-ear detection, and automatic switching between devices
Audio Sharing between two sets of AirPods on your iPhone, iPad, iPod touch, or Apple TV
Find My with proximity view for AirPods Pro and Precision Finding for charging case
White
Safety Data Sheet

dummyKey.title: Fellowes Standard Footrest, Graphite (48121)

paragraph: Enjoy comfort throughout the day with this adjustable footrest that customizes to each person's specific preferences. This footrest helps encourage proper circulation with its tilt and lock design for optimal foot placement. The textured bumps of this footrest help promote stress relief through concentrating on specific pressure points. This Fellowes footrest helps individuals feel less tightness and strain in their feet. Fellowes Standard Footrest offers dual-position height adjustment with a Free-Floating platform that encourages lower leg movement to help reduce fatigue. A textured surface massages the soles of your feet for stress reduction. Product contains 89% post-consumer recycled materials.
bullets: Footrest helps improve circulation while seating at the workstation
The adjustable height makes this the perfect way for you to maximize your comfort
Textured surface massages soles of feet
Dimensions: 3.75"H x 17.63"W x 13.13"D
5-year manufacturer limited warranty
Product contains 89% post-consumer recycled materials
headliner: Enhance seated comfort with this discreet and ergonomically designed Fellowes Standard footrest.

Adaptive EQ tunes music to your ears in real time to deliver crisp, clean high notes and deep, rich bass in stunning clarity. AirPods Pro when paired with Apple Vision Pro deliver Lossless Audio with ultra-low latency, for an unprecedented sound experience. Communicating at industry-shattering speed and unlocking a revolutionary new format rendering pure, uncompressed sound in real time. Active Noise Cancellation removes twice as much unwanted noise, so nothing interrupts your listening during a commute and when you need to focus. Transparency mode reduces and adjusts down the intensity of loud noises at 48,000 times per second, so you can comfortably hear the world around you. And Adaptive Audio¹⁶ dynamically blends Transparency mode with Active Noise Cancellation to deliver the best listening experience for you in any environment.

dummyKey.title: Fellowes Standard Footrest, Graphite (48121)

paragraph: Enjoy comfort throughout the day with this adjustable footrest that customizes to each person's specific preferences. This footrest helps encourage proper circulation with its tilt and lock design for optimal foot placement. The textured bumps of this footrest help promote stress relief through concentrating on specific pressure points. This Fellowes footrest helps individuals feel less tightness and strain in their feet. Fellowes Standard Footrest offers dual-position height adjustment with a Free-Floating platform that encourages lower leg movement to help reduce fatigue. A textured surface massages the soles of your feet for stress reduction. Product contains 89% post-consumer recycled materials.
bullets: Footrest helps improve circulation while seating at the workstation
The adjustable height makes this the perfect way for you to maximize your comfort
Textured surface massages soles of feet
Dimensions: 3.75"H x 17.63"W x 13.13"D
5-year manufacturer limited warranty
Product contains 89% post-consumer recycled materials
headliner: Enhance seated comfort with this discreet and ergonomically designed Fellowes Standard footrest.

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: The Sistema Salad To Go set features a divided insert tray and a dressing container in the center with a lid, so you can keep ingredients separate until you're ready to eat. The generously sized base is perfect for mixing up your salads, while the convenient knife and fork clip into the lid, so you don't have to carry separate cutlery. It's top-rack dishwasher safe, microwave safe without the lid, and freezer safe.
bullets: Divided insert tray plus a lidded dressing container to keep ingredients separate
Features the distinctive Sistema easy-locking clips and flexible seal; great for meal prep
Top-rack dishwasher safe, microwave safe without the lid, and freezer safe; phthalate- and BPA-free
Fun, colorful containers are designed and made in New Zealand
Colors received may vary
